steps.title: Use Trofimov's hardships
steps.content: Trofimov says he has undergone a great deal, then explains that he has been hungry, ill, shaken, and tossed everywhere by fate. The word describes living through difficult events.

steps.title: Match the meaning in context
steps.content: Choice A means discovered or exposed. Choice B means failed to notice. Choice D means told or connected. In context, the word means went through or experienced hardships. The answer is C.
